title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7 Pro XG, black
description: Ubiquiti U7-Pro-XG-B is a new black-coloured WiFi 7 UniFi Tri-band access point with a transfer speed of up to 5.8Gbps in the 6GHz band, up to 4.3Gbps in the 5GHz band, and up to 688 Mbps in the 2.4GHz band, featuring advanced WPA3 encryption. The U7-Pro-XG is designed for WiFi coverage in your home, office, hotel spaces, or warehouse, supporting up to 300+ connected clients. Full roaming support ensures seamless client transition between individual APs. For network connectivity is equipped… Roaming â seamless transition between APs without interruptions Wireless uplink â ideal for locations where a data cable cannot be installed Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balancing â maintaining even load distribution / band steering Speed limiting for each SSID Device Ceiling mounting kit Screw set
